title: Dev Residency Summary Gate And Execution History Demotion Execution
objective: Hard-demote the remaining higher-leverage Dev Residency summary gate and execution records so those May 2026 bridge records no longer read like live remediation or root-entry execution guidance for the standalone repo boundary.
dependency_note: After Packet 175, the next adjacent non-Phase-5 residue is a small Dev Residency bridge family: the API-origin remediation publication gate, the root-entrypoint routing execution record, and the gate that published that execution to the authoritative host mirror. Those records describe already-closed work, but their titles and top sections still present themselves like live remediation or execution guidance instead of historical provenance with current routing.
execution_scope: Retitle the targeted Dev Residency handoffs as historical gate or execution records and add explicit current-routing blocks.
Retitle the targeted Dev Residency packet JSON titles as historical records and add explicit historical-note and current-routing fields.
Preserve the detailed publication, execution, and host-parity evidence as provenance rather than rewriting the historical bridge records wholesale.
forbidden_scope: broad Dev Residency archive rewriting beyond top-entry demotion and routing context
Phase 5 summary gate normalization in the same packet
success_criteria: Each targeted Dev Residency handoff now leads as a historical record instead of a live remediation or root-entry execution bridge.
Each targeted Dev Residency packet JSON now carries explicit historical-note and current-routing context instead of reading like a still-live gate or execution definition.
Repo-owned status routing records the family closure and leaves any remaining narrower packet-history surfaces for fresh reassessment afterward.
validation_commands: Select-String -Path ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-05-olares-dev-residency-026-packet-022-closeout-through-packet-025-api-origin-remediation-authority-publication-and-host-mirror-resync-gate-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-069-root-entrypoint-routing-refresh-execution-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-070-packet-068-and-packet-069-authority-publication-and-host-mirror-resync-gate-handoff.md -Pattern '^# Historical Olares Dev Residency','^Current routing:'
next_action: Execute this packet as a separate Dev Residency bridge-record slice, then reassess the remaining packet-history and provenance-routing surfaces for the next smallest current-looking family.
